CustomField.formula: OR( ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Failed Income Certification - Pending Appeal"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Failed Income Certification"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Withdrawn / No Longer Interested"), ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Status__c , "Certified - Expired") )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Ineligibility by Status for reports. Check true if one of these statuses: Failed Income Certification - Pending Appeal,Failed Income Certification,Withdrawn - No Longer Interested,Certified - On Hold,Certified - Expired
CustomField.label: Ineligibility
